subject: Status review: meeting milestone in Auckland | Frida Kahlo | Q4 review | INIT-5169
body: Team, we are aligning the next phase of meeting work in Auckland. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Validate staffing, budget assumptions, and handoff checkpoints. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Comparative note includes Frida Kahlo and Nikola Tesla as historical analogs. Reference initiative INIT-5169. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: readiness, handoff.
